description: SkipCalls provides an AI phone receptionist for businesses that answers calls, captures leads, books appointments, handles outbound calls and SMS, and sends summaries and transcripts. Customers manage it through a web dashboard and mobile apps tied to dedicated business phone numbers.
summary: SkipCalls exposes a Bearer-authenticated REST API at be.skipcalls.com plus an MCP server on the same host, with streamable HTTP `/mcp` supporting SkipCalls OAuth or API key auth and a legacy SSE `/sse` endpoint using API keys.
